zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell是Nicholas Lobdell和Jane的女兒，於1631年8月21日在英國戴文諾薩姆受洗。她於1651年10月20日與Jonathan Burt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1645年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。她去世於1684年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年53歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell是Nicholas Lobdell和Jane的女儿，于1631年8月21日在英国戴文諾薩姆受洗。她于1651年10月20日与Jonathan Burt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1645年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。她去世于1684年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年53岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Lobdell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell was christened on 21 August 1631, in Northam, Devon, England as the daughter of Nicholas Lobdell and Jane. She married Jonathan Burt on 20 October 1651, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1645. She died on 11 November 1684, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell a été baptisée le 21 août 1631, à Northam, Devon, Angleterre, fille de Nicholas Lobdell et Jane. Elle a épousé Jonathan Burt le 20 octobre 1651, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle a immigré au Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1645. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1684, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell wurde am 21. August 1631 in Northam, Devon, England, als Tochter von Nicholas Lobdell und Jane getauft. Sie hat am 20. Oktober 1651 in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Jonathan Burt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie ist 1645 nach Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Sie starb am 11. November 1684 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell è stato battezzato il 21 agosto 1631 nel Northam, Devon, England come figlia di Nicholas Lobdell e Jane. Lei sposato Jonathan Burt il 20 ottobre 1651, nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Immigrata nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1645. Morì il 11 novembre 1684, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdellは1631年8月21日にイギリスデボンノーサムでNicholas LobdellとJaneの娘として洗礼を受けた。1651年10月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドでJonathan Burtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに移住した。彼女は1684年11月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで53歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell(은)는 1631년 8월 21일 영국 데폰 노르섬에서 Nicholas Lobdell(와)과 Jane의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1651년 10월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 Jonathan Burt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1645년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1684년 11월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell foi batizada em 21 de agosto de 1631, em Northam, Devon, Inglaterra filha de Nicholas Lobdell e Jane. Ela casou-se com Jonathan Burt em 20 de outubro de 1651, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1645. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1684, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell была крещена 21 августа 1631 г. в местности нортам, девон, Англия. Её родителей звали Nicholas Lobdell и Jane. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jonathan Burt 20 октября 1651 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она иммигрировала в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1645 году. Она умерла 11 ноября 1684 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lobdell se bautizó el 21 de agosto de 1631, en Northam, Devon, Inglaterra como hija de Nicholas Lobdell y Jane. Se casó con Jonathan Burt el 20 de octubre de 1651, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Inmigró a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1645. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1684, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
